Inputs

Text fields, search bars, selects, and textareas. Clean focus states with brand-colored rings.

Text Input

Text Inputs

This field is required

Search Input

Search
⌘K

Select

Select Inputs

Textarea

Textarea

Markdown supported

Input with Prefix/Suffix

Decorated Inputs
$

Usage Guidelines

• Always include a visible label above the input — never rely on placeholder text alone

• Focus ring is purple with 20% opacity — consistent brand reinforcement

• Error states use red border + helper text below the field

• ⌘K shortcut badge on search inputs signals keyboard-first design

• Background is elevated (one step lighter than base) to create subtle depth

• Disabled inputs use 50% opacity with base background
